description_of_loss: On 02/03/2025, a tree located on property owned by Douglas R. Wentworth at 1100 N. Meridian Street, Oklahoma City, OK 73107 fell onto our insured's property at 4500 W. Colfax Avenue, Denver, CO 80204. The tree, which our arborist confirms was dead or severely diseased prior to the incident, caused substantial damage to our insured's patio and rear exterior wall.
